option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# **Containerization Plan** ## **Goal** Setup Dockerfiles for the WallApp Android project to run inside of containers for building the application. Do not set up docker-compose for running locally as it is not required.
## **List of services to be containerized** - **app** (/Users/shubhamy/Developer/hobby_projects/WallApp/app) - **Language**: Kotlin/Java (Android) - **Build System**: Gradle - **Java Version**: 21 - **Entry Point**: Android application (APK/AAB build) - **Dependencies**: - Firebase (Database, Messaging, Analytics) - Google Play Services (Ads) - AndroidX libraries - Material Design components - Glide for image loading
## **Execution Steps** > **Below are the steps for Copilot to follow; ask Copilot to update or execute this plan.**
Steps to containerize the project:
1. **Check containerization pre-requisites:** - Ensure Docker is installed and running.
2. **Scan the repository using tool 'appmod-analyze-repository':** - Analyze the Android project structure - Detect build system and dependencies - Identify the main application module
3. **Check code is ready to run in a local container:** - Ensure the application reads configuration from environment variables - Review the application's dependencies that must be hosted in the cloud (Firebase) - List cloud dependencies for the user
4. **Create a Dockerfile for the project:** - Use tool 'appmod-plan-generate-dockerfile' to generate the Dockerfile - Create a Dockerfile optimized for Android builds with Gradle and Java 21
5. **Build the Docker images for the project:** - Use docker build command to build the Docker images (do not run) - Tag the images with the proper version (1.2.0)
6. **Summarize the successful containerization:** - List out the dockerfiles created for the project - Describe to the user the code edits required to successfully containerize the project - Document any cloud dependencies that need to be configured

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Build Check
on: push: branches: [ main, master, develop ] pull_request: branches: [ main, master, develop ]
jobs: build: name: Build Debug APK runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps: - name: Checkout code uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set up JDK 21 uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '21' distribution: 'temurin' cache: gradle
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x gradlew
- name: Build debug APK run: ./gradlew assembleDebug --stacktrace
- name: Upload debug APK uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: debug-apk path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk retention-days: 7

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Deploy to Google Play
on: push: tags: - 'v*.*.*' # Triggers on version tags like v1.2.0, v1.3.0, etc. workflow_dispatch: # Allows manual triggering inputs: track: description: 'Release track' required: true default: 'internal' type: choice options: - internal - alpha - beta - production
jobs: deploy: name: Deploy to Play Store runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps: - name: Checkout code uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set up JDK 21 uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '21' distribution: 'temurin' cache: gradle
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x gradlew
- name: Decode Keystore run: | echo "${{ secrets.KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}" | base64 --decode > $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/keystore.jks
- name: Build Release AAB run: ./gradlew bundleRelease --stacktrace env: KEYSTORE_FILE: ${{ github.workspace }}/keystore.jks KEYSTORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.KEYSTORE_PASSWORD }} KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.KEY_ALIAS }} KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.KEY_PASSWORD }}
- name: Decode Service Account JSON run: | echo "${{ secrets.PLAY_STORE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON }}" | base64 --decode > $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/service-account.json
- name: Upload to Google Play uses: r0adkll/upload-google-play@v1.1.3 with: serviceAccountJson: ${{ github.workspace }}/service-account.json packageName: com.sky.wallapp releaseFiles: app/build/outputs/bundle/release/*.aab track: ${{ inputs.track || 'internal' }} status: completed inAppUpdatePriority: 2 whatsNewDirectory: distribution/whatsnew mappingFile: app/build/outputs/mapping/release/mapping.txt
- name: Upload build artifacts uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: play-store-release path: | app/build/outputs/bundle/release/*.aab app/build/outputs/mapping/release/mapping.txt retention-days: 90
- name: Cleanup if: always() run: | rm -f $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/keystore.jks rm -f $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/service-account.json

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Release Build
on: push: tags: - 'v*.*.*' # Triggers on version tags like v1.2.0, v1.3.0, etc. workflow_dispatch: # Allows manual triggering from GitHub Actions tab
jobs: release: name: Build and Release runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps: - name: Checkout code uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set up JDK 21 uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '21' distribution: 'temurin' cache: gradle
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x gradlew
- name: Decode Keystore if: ${{ secrets.KEYSTORE_BASE64 != '' }} run: | echo "${{ secrets.KEYSTORE_BASE64 }}" | base64 --decode > $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/keystore.jks
- name: Build Release AAB (Signed) if: ${{ secrets.KEYSTORE_BASE64 != '' }} run: ./gradlew bundleRelease --stacktrace env: KEYSTORE_FILE: ${{ github.workspace }}/keystore.jks KEYSTORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.KEYSTORE_PASSWORD }} KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.KEY_ALIAS }} KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.KEY_PASSWORD }}
- name: Build Release AAB (Unsigned) if: ${{ secrets.KEYSTORE_BASE64 == '' }} run: ./gradlew bundleRelease --stacktrace
- name: Build Release APK (Signed) if: ${{ secrets.KEYSTORE_BASE64 != '' }} run: ./gradlew assembleRelease --stacktrace env: KEYSTORE_FILE: ${{ github.workspace }}/keystore.jks KEYSTORE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.KEYSTORE_PASSWORD }} KEY_ALIAS: ${{ secrets.KEY_ALIAS }} KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.KEY_PASSWORD }}
- name: Build Release APK (Unsigned) if: ${{ secrets.KEYSTORE_BASE64 == '' }} run: ./gradlew assembleRelease --stacktrace
- name: Get version from tag id: get_version run: echo "VERSION=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
- name: Create GitHub Release uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1 with: name: Release ${{ steps.get_version.outputs.VERSION }} draft: false prerelease: false files: | app/build/outputs/bundle/release/*.aab app/build/outputs/apk/release/*.apk env: GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
- name: Upload AAB Artifact uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: release-aab path: app/build/outputs/bundle/release/*.aab retention-days: 30
- name: Upload APK Artifact uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: release-apk path: app/build/outputs/apk/release/*.apk retention-days: 30
